spec_match.rationale: Perfect multi-threaded database simulator proving SQLite transaction serialization using standard IndexedDB readwrite pipelines.

interactive.rationale: Exceptional interface featuring customizable count ranges, dynamic lane progress meters, a transaction log console, and a separate verification analyzer.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned. Demonstrates how concurrent multi-tab writers map to SQLite WAL pages without deadlocking.

edge_cases.rationale: Properly manages batch sizes up to 8 concurrent transaction loops.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard stone color grids and beautiful progress fill lanes.

summary: The concurrent-writers is a top-tier benchmark environment validating SQLite WAL multi-tab safety in high-concurrency writing modes.
